summary: Iteration 26: Simulation Lab Frontend Testing - All features verified. Page loads at /operator/simulation route. Sidebar shows 'Simulation Lab' nav link with Zap icon. Safety banner displays isolation warning. Mode selector toggles between Single Device and Fleet Simulation forms. Single Device form: device dropdown populates from API, pattern type dropdown has Normal/Aggressive/Critical options, duration/interval inputs accept numbers, signal/gap/eval toggles work. Dry Run and Run Simulation buttons work and show results panel. Results panel shows run_id, devices affected, records created, anomalies triggered, SIMULATION MODE watermark. Fleet mode: device scope (All/Subset), strategy dropdown, subset mode shows device selection grid. Form is disabled during submission (loading state). RBAC: guardian cannot access Simulation Lab (redirected with 'Access denied. Operator role required.' toast). No console errors on page load.

frontend.pattern_type_dropdown: PASS - Pattern Type dropdown has Normal Drain, Aggressive Drain, Critical Failure options

frontend.run_simulation_button: PASS - Run Simulation button triggers API and shows results

frontend.fleet_mode_strategy: PASS - Pattern Strategy dropdown has 'Uniform Aggressive' and 'Mixed' options
frontend.fleet_mode_subset_device_selection: PASS - Subset mode shows device selection grid with clickable device buttons
frontend.form_disabled_during_submission: PASS - Buttons disabled with loading spinner during submission
frontend.rbac_guardian_error_toast: PASS - 'Access denied. Operator role required.' error toast shown

api_verification.fleet_simulation_api: PASS - Fleet simulation API returns correct response with simulation_run_id, total_devices_affected, total_records_created, scheduler_execution_ms, anomalies_triggered, anomaly_distribution, per_device_results

critical_code_review_comments: All Simulation Lab features implemented correctly
RBAC properly enforced - guardian cannot access Simulation Lab (403 + redirect)
Single Device form has all required elements: device selector, pattern presets, duration/interval, toggles
Fleet form has device scope (All/Subset), strategy dropdown, device selection grid in subset mode
Results panel shows comprehensive metrics: run_id, devices affected, records created, anomalies triggered
SIMULATION MODE watermark correctly displayed in results panel
Loading state properly disables buttons during API calls
Fleet simulation with evaluation takes ~10 seconds due to baseline/anomaly detection - consider showing progress indicator
No console errors on page load and user interactions
seed_data_creation: Created fleet simulation with DEV-001 and DEV-002 using aggressive drain pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: Simulation Lab frontend fully tested. All features working: page loads at /operator/simulation, sidebar nav link with Zap icon, safety banner, mode selector (Single Device/Fleet), device dropdown, pattern presets (Normal/Aggressive/Critical), duration/interval inputs, signal/gap/eval toggles, Run Simulation and Dry Run buttons, results panel with metrics and SIMULATION MODE watermark, fleet mode with device scope and strategy selection, subset device selection grid, loading state. RBAC verified: guardian redirected with 403 toast. No console errors. Note: Fleet simulation with evaluation takes ~10 seconds due to baseline/anomaly detection.
